sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107550" key="u(perqa/lassos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερθάλασσος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n107550.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">over the sea, overseas,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βασιλεῖς ὑπερθάλασσοι</foreign> (sic codd., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-θαλάσσιοι</foreign> Hercher) <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:2:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
